sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91529" key="pucografe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυξο-γρᾰφέω</orth>, <sense id="n91529.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">write</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">draw on a tablet</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:1:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.51</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
